title: Staurogyne nitida
taxonomy: Staurogyne nitida is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to Southeast Asia and is a popular choice among aquarium hobbyists due to its unique, low-maintenance requirements. Staurogyne nitida is a type of stem plant that thrives in soft to moderate water and can tolerate a range of lighting conditions. The plant is typically grown as a foreground plant in aquatic environments and can grow up to 10-15 cm in height. Staurogyne nitida is often used to create a lush, green carpet in aquariums and is available in various colors and forms.
